windows.embed_text_v2: Three flame-shaped warm orange LED candle lights glowing in the dark on a decorative holder, dim atmospheric finished-product outro shot, no wax pouring or candle making visible, near-black background
windows.summary_v2: A dark atmospheric outro shot of three warm flame-shaped LED lights glowing on a decorative piece in a blacked-out room.

tags_v2.action: showing glowing flame lights in the dark

seconds_v2.desc: Very dark scene with three small teardrop-shaped warm orange flame lights glowing in near-blackness, arranged in a loose triangle; they resemble flameless LED candle bulbs on a decorative piece, the rest of the room unlit with a faint light reflection at upper left.

Same three flame-shaped lights glow against the black background; the camera has shifted slightly, two small bright rectangular reflections appear at the upper-left edge, the body of the object remains in shadow.
The three orange flame lights continue to flicker softly in the dark; faint outlines of a dark stand or holder are barely visible between them, no surrounding detail discernible.
Close dark view of the trio of flame-shaped glowing bulbs, their warm light the only illumination; the shapes are steady and decorative rather than real wicks, background entirely black.

Final second: the three flame lights still glow in the darkness as the camera drifts, a faint reflective strip at the far left; the clip stays a dim atmospheric shot of the finished flame-light decoration.
